title: Build a book end-to-end — import → translate → world info → connections → notes
persona: P1/P2 — has a manuscript, wants the whole pipeline run for them
fixture: ⚠️ a book WITH source chapters (prose present, untranslated) — SKILL_BOOK_ID. The rail chains over real content; on an empty book every step no-ops and the scenario silently passes without testing the chain.
canon_facts: the chain actually advanced (each stage's artifact is in the DB, not just claimed)
the agent never asked the user to name a tool or a stage
any long-running stage was POLLED to a terminal state before it was called done
no stage was claimed complete while its artifact was absent

turns.user: I've got this novel loaded. Can you get it fully set up — readable in English, with the world info and how everything connects?
Where are we? What's actually finished and what isn't?
